title: A Word from the President, January 2016
summary: Photo by Yuit LLC. Happy new year! If you’re like me, you’ve been reflecting on the past year and setting goals for the new one. Maybe you’ve decided to get healthier this year, or perhaps you’re aiming to take a new step in your career. title: Shareholder Spotlight: Michael Clark Sr.
summary: CIRI shareholder, Michael Clark Sr. Michael Clark Sr. has a reputation. When he goes to art shows, the other artists know him as the ATM killer – the guy who persuades customers to pull out cash and buy his stone carvings until the ATM is empty. It’s a pretty good reputation to have. Clark has been carving stone since he was eight...
